backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with no methods defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to related frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short human-written summaries for major frontend files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles plus OKLCH theme variables defining light and dark color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with meta tags, font imports, and root div for mounting the app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component composing all site sections with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/BrandMark.tsx: Brand component rendering the 3D block-style logo and tagline.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section showing phone, WhatsApp, address, hours, and CTA card using businessInfo data.
frontend/src/components/sections/Gallery: Displays a gallery grid using images from siteContent with responsive layout and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Renders the homepage hero with background image, business intro text, and call/WhatsApp buttons.
frontend/src/components/sections/HowItWo: Shows a four-step process from siteContent with numbered icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Service: Lists services with associated icons and descriptions pulled from siteContent.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Displays customer testimonials in a responsive grid with quote icons.
frontend/src/components/sections/WhyChoo: Presents reasons to choose the business with icons and short descriptions from siteContent.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer with brand, quick links, social icons, and attribution.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky responsive header with smooth-scroll navigation and mobile menu.
frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts: Contains static business info, service lists, gallery data, testimonials, and other content arrays.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, managing login, logout, and stored identity loading.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles, CSS variables for themes, typography, and layout utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS config enabling dark mode, custom colors, typography, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, requirements, issues, and image needs for building a laundry/steam ironing business website.
